evidence: "Well written and very well acted drama."
"This real-to-life drama, is moving, and yes, a good supply of tissues ought to be at hand."

"Kevin Bacon does a magnificent job in the role he plays."

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama films that evoke deep emotional responses. They appreciate high production quality and are sensitive to pacing, often finding slower narratives more engaging. Brand loyalty is evident towards Nicholas Sparks, indicating a taste for heartfelt and moving stories.
